title: `podman compose` doesn't work with `Containerfile`
body:
### Issue Description

Running `podman compose` on a compose file with a build step, won't search for `Containerfile`.
The old `podman-compose` work as expected.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

1. Create a compose file with build step pointing to a directory containing `Containerfile`
2. Run `podman compose up`

### Describe the results you received

```sh
Dockerfile: no such file or directory
```

### Describe the results you expected

Should work with both `Dockerfile` & `Containerfile` without having to explicitly specify the file name

comments.body: `podman compose` contains no logic is just executes either docker-compose or podman-compose so in you case like docker-compose, so you have to configure it to use podman-compose, see https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman-compose.1.html
